default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on Webflow developer content initiatives and align on next steps for integration docs, organic content, and AI SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration docs need refinement; Calendly chosen as next template](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Organic content article ready for review; blog publishing process defined](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Plans to create developers.webflow.com property with dedicated blog](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [AI SEO tracking initiative launched to monitor Webflow mentions in LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Topics

### Integration Documentation Refinement

  - [Anushri provided feedback on Stripe integration doc](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
      - [Suggested more action-oriented language and linking to existing help articles](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [Recommended simplifying wordy sections](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Team to create Calendly integration doc as next template](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Will reach out to Bessie's team for access to university workspace for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)

### Organic Content Strategy

  - [First calibration article ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Vivian to oversee publishing process on Webflow blog](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Plans to create dedicated blog on developers.webflow.com](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Team to provide recommendations on developer docs structure and navigation](https://fathom.video/share/afhDLsfrLZCCxcZsYToXEF1X6tx1jCP2?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
